title: Italian Options Organza Chiffon Ribbon, Sheer Organza Ribbons for Gift Wrapping, Presents, Crafting, Wedding, Flower Bouquets, Birthday, Decorations, Décor, 15mm x 20 Metres, Emerald
availability_text: Only 6 left in stock (more on the way).
features: PREMIUM QUALITY: Available in over 30 stunning colours and 4 sizes, our premium organza ribbon is made from durable 100% nylon fibres that have a natural glistening shimmer. Designed to last, this high-quality ribbon won't fray or snag once cut.

ORGANZA: A lightweight luxury ribbon that exudes sophistication and elegance, our shimmering sheer ribbon features a woven edge for a premium finish. Soft yet structured, it’s perfect for bows, flowers, gift wrap, wedding stationery, and decorations.

A COLOUR FOR EVERY OCCASION: Elevate any gift or craft project with this delightfully tactile fabric ribbon. Available in pink, blue, black, white, cream, yellow, red, rose, pastel shades, and brights, there’s a wrapping ribbon for every occasion.

CARE INSTRUCTIONS: Nylon organza gift ribbon is delicate, so hand washing is recommended. Italian Options ribbons are REACH-compliant (SVHC-free) and OEKO-TEX 100 certified to meet the highest safety and quality standards.

ABOUT US: Founded in 1987, Italian Options is a family-run British company supplying premium craft supplies for over 38 years, including wedding favours, stationery, and decorations to help you craft, create, and celebrate life’s special moments.
